description: Public webhook bridge contract for phased federation between LINE Harness OSS and the FUGUE orchestration runtime.
_comment_contract_shape: Matches the existing integration contract pattern: flat top-level identity and ingress fields first, followed by bridge-specific routing and rollout controls.
_comment_bridge_endpoint: Endpoint contract for the bridge receiver that accepts LINE webhook payloads and hands off only approved events into FUGUE lanes.
_comment_hmac: LINE webhook verification remains mandatory and fail-closed. Secret material is referenced by environment variable name only.
_comment_event_routing: Only friend_add and the initial message_received path are active. score_threshold and cv_fire stay as placeholders until later phases.
_comment_model_routing: Multi-model routing preserves the ADR trio: codex for critical decisions, glm for lightweight classification, gemini for visual interpretation.
_comment_deferred_reply: message_received must ACK immediately, then complete the agent path asynchronously to stay within LINE reply timing constraints.
_comment_federation_modes: Shadow is the Phase 2 default. Selective expands execution scope in Phase 3. Full federation is reserved for Phase 4.
_comment_kill_switch: A single environment toggle disables all federated forwarding and keeps LINE Harness local-only.
_comment_phase_gates: Phase gates separate low-risk bridge activation from higher-risk reply and campaign automation paths.
